page_metadata.biotools__summary: Developed for predicting mitochondrial proteins of malaria parasite Plasmodium falciparum . All models were trained and tested on 175 proteins (40 mitochondrial & 135 non-mitochondrial proteins) and evaluated using five-fold cross validation.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Developed for predicting mitochondrial proteins of malaria parasite Plasmodium falciparum . All models were trained and tested on 175 proteins (40 mitochondrial & 135 non-mitochondrial proteins) and evaluated using five-fold cross validation.
